name: cotailor
description: CoTailor — collaborative AI resume tailoring agent (monorepo)

scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:web
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --parallel --filter @cotailor/api --filter @cotailor/web --filter @cotailor/admin run dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @cotailor/api run typecheck && pnpm --filter @cotailor/web run typecheck && pnpm --filter @cotailor/admin run typecheck
scripts.setup: pnpm run db:up && pnpm run prisma:generate && pnpm run db:push
